title: FrontmatterBase
description: Base shape of the YAML frontmatter block on every node, across all kinds. Kind-specific schemas (`skill`, `agent`, `command`, `hook`, `note`) extend this via `allOf`. camelCase keys throughout. `additionalProperties` is intentionally permissive; the deterministic `unknown-field` rule emits warnings for keys outside the catalog so that the JSON Schema remains shape-only and policy lives in rules.

type.description: User-declared kind hint. Optional; the adapter may use it to tie-break classification. Free-form string so that new kinds introduced by adapters don't require a spec bump.

author.description: Primary author. Denormalized into `node.author` for query speed.

authors.description: Additional authors. MAY include the primary author; consumers dedupe on display.

metadata.description: Structured metadata. REQUIRED. `version` inside is REQUIRED; all other fields are optional.

version.description: Semver of this node's content. REQUIRED. Denormalized into `node.version`.

specCompat.description: Semver range of spec versions this node targets.

supersedes.description: `node.path` values this node replaces. Feeds the `supersedes` link kind.

supersededBy.description: `node.path` that replaces this one. Inverse of `supersedes`.

source.description: Canonical origin URL (e.g. GitHub blob). Consumed by enrichment plugins for hash verification.

sourceVersion.description: Tag, SHA, or branch at the source. Branches are resolved dynamically by enrichment.

requires.description: `node.path` or plugin id values this node depends on.

conflictsWith.description: Nodes or plugin ids that MUST NOT be co-enabled with this one.

provides.description: Capability tokens this node advertises (free-form strings).

related.description: `node.path` values for see-also navigation. No strict semantics.

icon.description: Free-form icon hint (emoji, lucide name, URL).

color.description: CSS color or predefined palette token.

priority.description: Higher = surface earlier in UI listings.

hidden.description: UI hint: hide from default lists.

readme.description: Relative or absolute path to an extended README for this node.
